statement: One line stating the cross-examination move.
_schema_notes: `effect` records what the move changed so a challenge can visibly move a claim's confidence, status, scope, or withdrawal state. change_type=none (or a missing effect) renders as today. `field` names the affected claim field; `before`/`after` its values; `resolves[]` the X-### this move (partially) settles. A `resolved` contradiction must cite the E-###/M-### that settled it (see contradiction_record.json.resolution).
